= CouchbaseRoleBinding Resource
include::partial$autogen-reference-aliases.adoc[tags=couchbaserolebinding]
:resource-name-singular: couchbaserolebinding
:resource-name-plural: couchbaserolebindings
:resource-name-kind: CouchbaseRoleBinding

CouchbaseRoleBinding allows association of Couchbase users with groups.

The following is an example resource, depicting the overall structure and any defaults (consult the field reference for valid values for "empty" values, such as empty strings etc.):

[source,yaml,subs="+macros"]
----
<<couchbaserolebindings-apiversion,apiVersion>>: v2
<<couchbaserolebindings-kind,kind>>: CouchbaseRoleBinding
<<couchbaserolebindings-metadata,metadata>>:
  <<couchbaserolebindings-metadata-name,name>>: ""
<<couchbaserolebindings-spec,spec>>:
  <<couchbaserolebindings-spec-roleref,roleRef>>:
    <<couchbaserolebindings-spec-roleref-kind,kind>>: ""
    <<couchbaserolebindings-spec-roleref-name,name>>: ""
  <<couchbaserolebindings-spec-subjects,subjects>>:
  - <<couchbaserolebindings-spec-subjects-kind,kind>>: ""
    <<couchbaserolebindings-spec-subjects-name,name>>: ""
----

== couchbaserolebindings.spec

=== Constraints

*Required*

*Type*: `object`

=== Description

CouchbaseRoleBindingSpec defines the group of subjects i.e.
users, and the role i.e.
group they are a member of.

=== couchbaserolebindings.spec.roleRef

==== Constraints

*Required*

*Type*: `object`

==== Description

CouchbaseGroup being bound to subjects.

=== couchbaserolebindings.spec.roleRef.kind

==== Constraints

*Required*

*Type*: `string`

*Enumerations*: `CouchbaseGroup`

==== Description

Kind of role to use for binding.

=== couchbaserolebindings.spec.roleRef.name

==== Constraints

*Required*

*Type*: `string`

==== Description

Name of role resource to use for binding.

=== couchbaserolebindings.spec.subjects

==== Constraints

*Required*

*Type*: `[]object`

==== Description

List of users to bind a role to.

=== couchbaserolebindings.spec.subjects.kind

==== Constraints

*Required*

*Type*: `string`

*Enumerations*: `CouchbaseUser`

==== Description

Couchbase user/group kind.

=== couchbaserolebindings.spec.subjects.name

==== Constraints

*Required*

*Type*: `string`

==== Description

Name of Couchbase user resource.
